description.value:
A precision-engineered bow with a clockwork cam system that provides mechanical advantage at full draw. Arrows fly with extraordinary force and can punch through multiple enemies in a line at full power.

Training Levels

LevelProperties
UntrainedTwo-Handed, Ranged d6 (100/400), Piercing
BasicTwo-Handed, Ranged d10 (200/800), Piercing, Reload (object interaction), Clockwork, Puncture
MasterTwo-Handed, Ranged d10 (200/800), Piercing, Reload (object interaction), Clockwork, Puncture, Powerful Blow
Master PerkPowerful Blow: the attack deals normal damage to the primary target, then the arrow continues in a line and deals full weapon damage to a second target behind the first.

rmeData.masterPerk: Powerful Blow: the attack deals normal damage to the primary target and full weapon damage to a second target in line behind them.
